since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +3.02%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.44% · BTC -1.87% · Gold -2.00% · Nasdaq100 -1.35%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +3.02%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +3.02%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +6.15%, WDAY +5.36%, CRM +5.35%, TTD +4.86%. Laggards: APP -10.15%, ARM -6.31%, MRVL -6.16%, OKLO -5.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.23% at $139.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
